IT IS ALSO ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TAKE NOTHING FROM CROSS DEFENDANT, NATIONAL FLORIST DIRECTORY, INC, DBA: REDBOOK FLORIST SERVICES ON THE CROSS COMPLAINT, SAID CROSS DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR
